\tzpentry{ID3439}{Gold Berry Phase}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3439 introduces Gold Berry Phase as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \gamma_{gold} = 2\pi (1 - \frac{1}{\Phi}) = \pi(3 - \sqrt{5}) \approx 137.508^\circ $$
